name: Mara, The Indecent Watch.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Seems like this Catgirl forgot to plug in her earbuds.
Who watches porn in public???

Honestly, I had no clue what to name this one.

Trying a Thoughts System. Let me know if it works well.

Idk how this became my 4th most popular bot. This one was lowkey low effort for me.
